title: Inessentials
description: Adds extra crafting recipes that aren't necessary, but could be useful!
body:
# Inessentials

```
Recipes in Gallery / JEI Recommended
```


This vanilla+ mod adds very basic recipes that I imagined would be neat to have!
---
Personally I believe the recipes are quite intuitive, but you can see all of them in the mod's Gallery!
### Featuring:

- Recoloring stained glass,
- Recoloring stained glass panes,
- Recoloring terracotta,
- Recoloring glazed terracotta,
- Recoloring concrete powder,
- Recoloring concrete,
---
- Craftable bell,
- Craftable cobweb,
- Craftable leather,
- Craftable saddle,
- Craftable name tag,
- Craftable poisonous potato,
- Craftable glowing ink sac,
- Craftable crying obsidian,
- Craftable music discs,
- Craftable chainmal armor,
- Craftable horse armor,
---
- Uncrafting dripstone blocks,
- Uncrafting amethyst blocks,

- Extra dyes recipes,

- Smelthing/Blasting raw ore blocks;
